title: Basswood County
description: Mod inspired by the analog horror series "Basswood County"
body:
**GECKOLIB IS REQUIRED
**
                                    
** DISCORD: https://discord.gg/3WwPG3BBk4**
#                                       Basswood County

             Basswood County is a mod based on the analog horror series, "Basswood County" by DarkMind.



             The mod adds 3 new creatures, 2 new items, and one new biome. Each creature will be listed below.



#                                           Humanoid


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a1a62da1b44667ec63b91a159af95ef4aa5597d.png)
                                                                           



 The Humanoid is the most common entity found in the mod. It is quick, deadly, and silent.





#                                  THE BASSWOOD COUNTY KILLER
                                                                       
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ab6ed6c30bb4fbfaf31787c1aed5914a589f9a6_0.webp)
             
               
               
Slightly less common, the killer is silent and uses fear to haunt the player until he finds you... 

                                                                       He wants your skin...





#                                  Jeff's  Humanoid 

                                                                   
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c245dfa4a5f4723dd0a7a318134a6485860ac13e.png)


 Someone's skin has been taken...
